titleStmt.title: SII 11.38: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 38. (B.K. No. 182 of 1926-27). NARĒGAL, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE SET UP IN FRONT OF THE VILLAGE-chāvaḍi.

summary.p: The inscription refers itself to the reign of Akāḷavarsha Kṛishṇarājadēva (i.e., Kṛishṇa III) and introduces his Gaṅga subordinate Būtayya-Permāḍi who was governing the Gaṅgavāḍi Ninety-six Thousand extending as far as Peḻdoṟe (i.e., ‘the great river’). It registers the gift of a tank made to the dāna-śāle (charity house) attached to the basadi constructed by Padmabbarasi, a queen of Būtayya, by Na[ma]yara Mārasiṅghayya, on Sunday, Pausha, śu. 10, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti of the cyclic year Sādhāraṇa falling in Śaka 873. The gift was entrusted to Guṇachandra-Paṇḍita, a pupil of Vīraṇandi-Paṇḍita who was a disciple of Mahēndra-Paṇḍita of the Koṇḍakundānvaya and Dēsiga-gaṇa. The (Body of the) Eighteen Members (Padineṇbaru) and the (Body of the) Sixteen Members (Padinaṟuvaṟu) were to protect the gift.
The record reveals for the first time that Būtuga II had a queen named Padmabbarasi besides the Rāshṭrakūta princess Rēvakanimmaḍi.
By the saṅkrānti, the date of the record would correspond to Monday, December 23, A.D. 950.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastya kālavarṣadēva śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka rājya muttarōttaraṁ sale
śrī kriṣṇarājadēva pādapadmōpajīvi gaṅgānvayakuḷatiḷa
kaṁ būtayya permmāḍi peḻdoṟemaryyāde gaṅgāvāḍi toṁ
battaṟusāsiramumaṁ pratipāḷise Ātana manōnaya
na vallabhe pratyakṣa kalikālagauri lakṣmīsamanvite śrīmatpa
dmabbarasiya rttamma basadige dānasālege biḍise . svasti
sa kanṛpakāḷātīta saṁvvatsara sataṅga 873 neya sādhāraṇa
saṁvatsaraṁ pravarttise . tadvarṣābhyaṁtara pauṣya su 10 Ādi
tyavāramu muttarāyaṇada saṁkrāṁtiyoḷ namayaraThe expression may also be read as naṭeyara.
mārasiṅghayyaṁ koṇḍakundānvayada dēsigagaṇada mahēṁ
dra paṇḍitara siṣyarvvīraṇandi paṇḍitara varaśiṣyarguṇacaṁ
dra paṇḍitara kālaṁ kaḻci kereyaṁ biṭṭaṁ kiṟudeṟege O
ndu gadyāṇa varuvaṇa valliṁda ttakṣata mātramappodeṁ
tiṟe sarvvābhyaṁtara siddhi Aṁtappudaṁ padineṇbaruṁ padina
ṟuvaruṁ kāvar . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣaśahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyā
tē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛ
pāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvēnētāṁ
bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrō bhūyō bhūyō mabhadraḥ .Before this letter a space for the four letters yācatē rā is left blank.
Digital edition of SII 11.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
